sourceMovie.title: Until Dawn
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Until Dawn works as a horror movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The horror and mystery blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Saw
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Until Dawn clicked for you, Saw (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and mystery, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Until Dawn?
faq.answer: Try Saw, Scream, Crimson Peak—each shares DNA with Until Dawn while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Until Dawn?
faq.answer: Until Dawn (2025) is best described as Horror, Mystery. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Until Dawn worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
